selections.name: Stormy Reign
selections.reason: Consistent recent form with a 2nd and 3rd. Ready to break through.

selections.name: Graynita
selections.reason: Brings solid Victorian form which often measures up well here.

selections.name: Simone's Choice
selections.reason: Has early speed from the inside draw to control the pace.

selections.name: Fire Chat
selections.reason: Improved last start at Gundagai and should be peaking third-up.

danger_horse.name: Brutal To The Max
danger_horse.reason: Racing well recently and sure to be around the mark.

selections.name: Sacred Inferno
selections.reason: Broke maiden impressively last start and draws perfectly.

selections.name: Seasmoke
selections.reason: Consistent filly who finds a winnable race here.

selections.name: Sturty
selections.reason: Ran well at Goulburn last start and has the ability to feature.

selections.name: Savahay
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak. Profiles nicely for this.

danger_horse.name: Menzah One
danger_horse.reason: Can improve off recent runs and find the frame.

selections.name: Boa Vista
selections.reason: Strong Victorian form and trained by an elite stable. Standout.

selections.name: She's Elusive
selections.reason: Runner-up at Swan Hill last start and looks a major threat.

selections.name: Meet Me At The Bar
selections.reason: Solid debut at Swan Hill and has plenty of scope for improvement.

selections.name: She's First Lady
selections.reason: Brings Victorian form and can figure in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Zouqua
danger_horse.reason: Can improve off a fair run at Gundagai.

selections.name: Midnight Luna
selections.reason: Won well last start and has found her best form. Ready to peak.

selections.name: Aristocrat
selections.reason: Very consistent gelding bringing strong Canberra form.

selections.name: Missile Leader
selections.reason: Solid provincial form and draws out to wind up down the long straight.

selections.name: Philadelphia Storm
selections.reason: Can improve second-up and has claims on best form.

danger_horse.name: Sundrop
danger_horse.reason: Ran well at Wagga last start and shouldn't be underestimated.

selections.name: First Assault
selections.reason: Well-supported on debut and ran a solid 4th. Top stable.

selections.name: Mr Avery
selections.reason: Brings Victorian form and will take great benefit from this run.

selections.name: Saker Falcon
selections.reason: Victorian raider who can improve second-up.

selections.name: Infinite Game
selections.reason: Ran okay at Swan Hill and has upside.

danger_horse.name: My Mate Elvis
danger_horse.reason: Can bounce back from a poor run last start.

selections.name: Dunna Runna
selections.reason: Massive class drop from a Rosehill BM68. The one to beat.

selections.name: Taytay Bay
selections.reason: Racing very well with a strong 2nd at Canberra last start.

selections.name: Anladio
selections.reason: Won last start and has the form to go back-to-back.

selections.name: High Torque
selections.reason: Brings solid Victorian form and can feature.

danger_horse.name: Launch Mode
danger_horse.reason: Won last start at Hillston and must be respected.

selections.name: Bargino
selections.reason: Runs well fresh and placed here last prep. Top chance in a weak field.

selections.name: Bridie's Luck
selections.reason: Has okay form but will need luck from the wide draw.

selections.name: Blue Moon Summit
selections.reason: Brings Victorian form and can improve second-up.

selections.name: Jukebox Flyer
selections.reason: Can run well fresh and has claims in this wide-open race.

danger_horse.name: Legendary Diva
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a bold return on her best form.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #9, Exacta Box 4-9, Trifecta 4,9 / 3,4,7,9 / ALL
